type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: PM10 emissions were mainly attributed to Cooling Towers on site. In 2021, some Cooling Towers were decommissioned and others were replaced. Additionally, new Cooling Towers were added to site.  There were also changes to the Total Dissolved Solids measurements. No change to calculation approach.

Additionally, new Cooling Towers were added to site. There were also changes to the Total Dissolved Solids measurements. No change to calculation approach.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: The majority of the PM10 emissions came from cooling towers, and only a very small portion is emitted from Natural Gas Combustion.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous years' NPRI required reporting of Part 5 speciated VOCs only if the total VOC exceeded 10 tonnes. This facility has historically emitted less than 10 tonnes in total VOC, and thus was never required to report Part 5 speciated VOCs. Due to changes in reporting requirements issued by NPRI, now facilities are required to report Part 5 speciated VOCs if any Part 5 VOC individually exceeded 1 tonne. Sanofi now meets this new requirement.
